product: Dynamic partition overwrite with INSERT REPLACE USING (Public Preview)
tagline: INSERT REPLACE USING is now in Public Preview for Databricks Runtime 16.3.
what_it_does: INSERT REPLACE USING is now in Public Preview for Databricks Runtime 16.3. This SQL command replaces part of the table with the result of a query. Rows are replaced when all columns listed in USING match with the = operator.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: INSERT REPLACE USING is now in Public Preview for Databricks Runtime 16.3. This SQL command replaces part of the table with the result of a query.
key_takeaway: INSERT REPLACE USING is now in Public Preview for Databricks Runtime 16.3.
